messages.snippet: Hi, I know for summer camp, there was some confusion about the transportation options (Northgate excluded originally). Is there a Northgate pickup available for spring break camp? Corey On Mon, Mar 30,

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Re: 2026 Final Confirmation: Spring Day Camps

messages.snippet: Thank you for reaching out! Eastgate is the only option for our Spring Break camps. Hannah Taylor Administrative & Registration Manager Outdoors for All Foundation 1800 Richards Road, Bellevue, WA

messages.snippet: Do you accept campers from Access Transportation? And if so, can you confirm the correct drop off location and address? On Mon, Mar 30, 2026 at 3:50 PM OFA- Programs <programs@outdoorsforall.org>

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Re: 2026 Final Confirmation: Spring Day Camps

messages.snippet: Hi Corey, Yes, we accept Access Transportation. Please set the drop off window 8:45-9:15 and 2:45-3:15. 6344 NE 74th St, Seattle, WA 98115 Let me know if you have any other questions! Britt Farrell

messages.snippet: Hi - I just wanted to close the loop here and confirm that Dane Badcock (Adult camp) and Reid Badcock (Teen/youth camp) will be arriving together via Access Transportation. Thanks, Corey On Thu, Apr 9,

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Re: 2026 Final Confirmation: Spring Day Camps

messages.snippet: Thanks Corey, we will be looking out for the access bus to get them this week! Get Outlook for iOS From: Corey Badcock <cbadcock@gmail.com> Sent: Sunday, April 12, 2026 6:59:33 PM To: Brittany
